mapper.sql: rt.id, rt.public_id::text AS publicKey, rt.public_id::text AS templateKey, rt.hospital_id AS hospitalId, h.public_id::text AS hospitalKey, h.code AS hospitalCode, h.name AS hospitalName, rt.modality_id AS modalityId, m.public_id::text AS modalityKey, m.abbr AS modalityCode, m.name AS modalityName, rt.template_name AS templateName, rt.template_content AS templateContent, rt.is_active = 1 AS active, TO_CHAR(rt.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createdAt, TO_CHAR(rt.modified_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS updatedAt, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT(COALESCE(uc.first_name, ''), ' ', COALESCE(uc.last_name, ''))), ''), uc.username, '') AS createdBy, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT(COALESCE(um.first_name, ''), ' ', COALESCE(um.last_name, ''))), ''), um.username, '') AS modifiedBy

INNER JOIN hospitals h ON h.id = rt.hospital_id AND h.is_active = 1 INNER JOIN modalities m ON m.id = rt.modality_id AND m.is_active = 1 LEFT JOIN users uc ON uc.id = rt.created_by LEFT JOIN users um ON um.id = rt.modified_by
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM pacs_result_templates rt
WHERE rt.id = #{id} AND rt.is_active = 1 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pacs_result_templates ( hospital_id, modality_id, template_name, template_content, is_active, created_by, modified_by, created_at, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{request.hospitalId}, #{request.modalityId}, #{request.templateName}, #{request.templateContent}, COALESCE(#{request.isActive}, 1), #{createdBy}, #{createdBy}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE pacs_result_templates SET hospital_id = #{request.hospitalId}, modality_id = #{request.modalityId}, template_name = #{request.templateName}, template_content = #{request.templateContent}, is_active = COALESCE(#{request.isActive}, is_active), modified_by = #{modifiedBy}, modified_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{request.id} AND is_active = 1
UPDATE pacs_result_templates SET is_active = 2, modified_by = #{modifiedBy}, modified_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_active = 1
